description_long: This is a white ceramic cup featuring a vibrant, whimsical illustration inspired by Studio Ghibli characters. The artwork wraps around the cup, depicting a dragon, a large gray Totoro holding a blue umbrella, soot sprites, and other fantastical figures in a watercolor style. The cup has a smooth, cylindrical body with a rounded rim and a single, sturdy handle. The base is flat, allowing it to stand securely on flat surfaces. The interior is plain white, contrasting with the colorful exterior artwork. The surface appears glossy, enhancing the vividness of the printed design.
description: A white ceramic cup with a colorful Studio Ghibli-inspired illustration and a glossy finish, featuring a handle and a flat base.
description_view_0: This view shows the dragon, a humanoid figure in a suit, and several small green and white creatures, all set against a watercolor background.
description_view_1: This view focuses on the handle, with only partial glimpses of the artwork visible on either side.
description_view_2: This view highlights a black masked figure, a top-hatted character, and a burst of orange, with the handle on the left.
description_view_3: This view centers on Totoro holding a blue umbrella, with soot sprites and a blue creature nearby.
